benefits.description: Noticeable eyebrow hair growth; gray hairs darkened; hair growing where it hadn't in years
Reduced need for moisturiser; historically dry facial skin improved
Chronic pimple/mass on shin that dermatologists could not resolve retreated back into skin and redness fading within about a week
Acne scars on cheek turned red and raised, possibly beginning a healing process

side_effects.description: Stings quite a lot at injection site around belly button, fades fairly quickly and feels like a mild bruise for the rest of the day

protocol_notes: Both peptides combined into one vial, one injection daily into subcutaneous fat around belly button. Primary motivation was skin benefits; eyebrow hair growth was unexpected. Approximately 2 weeks of use at time of post.
